text.en: If your Army Faction is **GREY KNIGHTS,** at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, you can select a number of units (see below) from your army that are on the battlefield (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units), provided every model in those units has this ability. The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

From the second battle round onwards, at the start of your Movement phase, if you did not select the maximum number of **GREY KNIGHTS** units from your army using the Gate of Infinity ability at the end of your opponent’s previous turn, you can select one **GREY KNIGHTS** unit from your army that is on the battlefield that could have been selected using the Gate of Infinity ability. Remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

**Designer’s Note:** *This means that your unit can retain its position* on *the battlefield at the end of your Command phase, and then be placed into Strategic Reserves at the start of your Movement phase,* to *set it up again in your Reinforcements step in another position.*
When you select a unit to be pinned by a friendly Purgation Squad unit’s Righteous Persecution ability, that enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with -1 to that battle‑shock roll.
text.de: Wenn du eine Einheit wählst, die durch die Fähigkeit Rechtschaffene Jäger einer befreundeten Purgatortrupp-Einheit niedergehalten wird, führt jene feindliche Einheit einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
text.es: Cuando haces que una unidad esté hostigada debido a la habilidad Persecución justa de una unidad Escuadra de Purgadores amiga, esa unidad debe hacer una tirada de acobardamiento restando 1 al resultado.
text.fr: Quand vous choisissez une unité pour être fixée par l’aptitude Persécution Légitime d’une unité d’Escouade Purgator amie, l’unité choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
text.it: Quando scegli un’unità affinché sia inchiodata dall’abilità Giusta Persecuzione di un’unità Squadra Epuratori amica, quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i Traumi con -1 a quel tiro per i Traumi.
text.ja: 味方パーゲイション・スカッド・ユニットの『正義の制圧』アビリティにより釘付け状態になるユニットを選択した時、その敵ユニットが行う戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 숙청 분대 유닛의 의로운 박해 능력으로 고정될 유닛을 지정 시, 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행해야 하며 그 전투충격 굴림에 -1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 在您为己方洗罪者小队单位的正义惩罚技能选择一个被压制的敌方单位时，那个敌方单位需要进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰结果 -1。

text.en:
Each time a **GREY KNIGHTS** unit from your army is selected to fight, that unit can take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, select one of the following rules. Until the end of the phase, that unit has that rule.

■ Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit with the **[PSYCHIC]** ability also have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
■ Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit with the **[PSYCHIC]** ability also have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

In your Shooting phase, when a friendly Interceptor Squad unit has shot, if that unit did not make an ingress move this turn, you can use this ability. If you do:
  • That unit cannot use its Personal Teleporters ability.
  • That unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".
text.de:
In deiner Fernkampfphase kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen, wenn eine befreundete Interceptortrupp-Einheit geschossen hat, sofern jene Einheit in diesem Zug keine Einsatzbewegung ausgeführt hat. Wenn du dies tust:
  • kann jene Einheit nicht ihre Fähigkeit Teleportmodule einsetzen.
  • kann jene Einheit eine Ansturmbewegung von bis zu W6+1" ausführen.
text.es:
En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Interceptores amiga haya disparado, si no hizo un movimiento de inserción en este turno, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces:
  • Esa unidad no puede usar su habilidad Teleportadores personales.
  • Esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento súbito de hasta 1D6+1".
text.fr:
À votre phase de Tir, une fois qu’une unité d’Escouade Interceptor amie a tiré, si elle n’a pas fait un mouvement d’arrivée à ce tour, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas :
  • L’unité ne peut pas utiliser son aptitude Téléporteurs Personnels.
  • L’unité peut faire un mouvement d’élan de D6+1" maximum.
text.it:
Puoi usare questa abilità nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità Squadra Intercettatori amica ha tirato, se quell’unità non ha effettuato un movimento di inserzione in questo turno. Se lo fai:
  • Quell’unità non può usare la sua abilità Teletrasporti Personali.
  • Quell’unità può effettuare un movimento d’impeto di massimo D6+1".
text.ja:
自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このターン中に突入移動を行っていない味方インターセプター・スカッド・ユニットが射撃を行ったとき、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合：
  • そのユニットは『パーソナル・テレポーター』アビリティを使用できない。
  • そのユニットは最大D6+1mvまで進撃移動を行える。
text.ko:
플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 요격원 분대 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료한 후, 그 유닛이 이번 턴에 진입 이동을 수행하지 않았다면 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 그 유닛이 개인용 텔레포터 능력을 사용할 수 없습니다.
  • 그 유닛이 최대 D6+1"의 쇄도 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
text.zh:
在己方射击阶段中，在一个己方拦截者小队单位完成射击后，如果那个单位在该回合没有进行入场移动，您可以使用本技能。若使用:
  • 那个单位不能使用自身的个人传送器技能。
  • 那个单位可以进行一次最多 D6+1" 的迸发移动。

text.en:
Certain areas of the battlefield are within your army’s Hallowed Ground, as follows:

■ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Hallowed Ground.
■ The area of the battlefield within 6" of one or more **PURIFIER SQUAD** units from your army is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

Each time a model in a **GREY KNIGHTS** unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible target or makes a melee attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If that unit is a **PURIFIER SQUAD** and/or is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, you can re‐roll the Hit roll instead.

Each time a unit from your army is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
**GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR** units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.
When a friendly Paladin Squad unit is selected to fight, if the S of those attacks is lower than the T of the target, those attacks have +1 to wound rolls.
text.de: Wenn eine befreundete Paladintrupp-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird und die S jener Attacken niedriger ist als der W des Ziels, haben jene Attacken +1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
text.es: Cuando una unidad Escuadra de Paladines amiga se elija para combatir, si la F de esos ataques es menor que la R del blanco, esos ataques tienen +1 a las tiradas para herir.
text.fr: Quand une unité d’Escouade Paladin amie est choisie pour combattre, si si la F de ces attaques est inférieure à l’E de la cible, ces attaques ont +1 aux jets de blessure.
text.it: Quando un'unità Squadra di Paladini amica viene scelta per combattere, se la Fo di quegli attacchi è inferiore alla R del bersaglio, quegli attacchi hanno +1 ai tiri per ferire.
text.ja: 味方パラディン・スカッド・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時、それらの攻撃の【攻】が攻撃対象の【耐】を下回っているならば、それらの攻撃のウーンズロールは+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 성기사 분대 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 공격의 위력이 대상의 내구보다 낮다면 그 공격의 타격 굴림에 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 在一个己方圣骑士小队被选择进行近战时，如果攻击的 S 属性小于目标的 T 属性，那么那些攻击的致伤掷骰结果 +1。

text.en: Each time a **GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE** unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it; until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit, and until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Purgation Squad</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Purgatortrupp</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo cuando una unidad <k>Escuadra de Purgadores</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité <k>Escouade Purgator</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>Squadra Epuratori</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>パーゲイション・スカッド</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>숙청 분대</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>洗罪小队</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Select one battle‑shocked enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
effect.de: Wähle eine erschütterte feindliche Einheit, die von mindestens einer jener Attacken getroffen wurde. Jene feindliche Einheit erleidet W3+1 tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga acobardada en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques. Esa unidad enemiga sufre 1D3+1 heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie ébranlée touchée par ces attaques. Elle subit D3+1 blessures mortelles.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica traumatizzata colpita da quegli attacchi. Quell’unità nemica subisce D3+1 ferite mortali.
effect.ja: それらの攻撃がヒットした戦闘ショック状態の敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットはD3+1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
effect.ko: 그 공격이 명중했으며 전투충격 상태인 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 D3+1의 치명상을 입습니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个被那些攻击命中且处于战斗震慑状态的敌方单位。那个敌方单位受到 D3+1 处致命伤。

fluff.en: With their spiritual armour shattered along with that of their physical forms, the very souls of the enemy fall prey to the devastating fire of the Purgators.
fluff.de: Nun, da ihre spirituelle Rüstung zusammen mit der ihres Leibes zerschlagen ist, sind es die Seelen selbst der Feinde, die dem vernichtenden Feuer der Purgatoren zum Opfer fallen.
fluff.es: Con su armadura espiritual destrozada junto con la de sus cuerpos físicos, las almas del enemigo caen presas del fuego devastador de los Purgadores.
fluff.fr: Alors que l’ennemi voit ses protections physiques et psychiques brisées par le tir des Purgators, ce dernier consume son âme.
fluff.it: Una volta infranta l’armatura spirituale insieme a quella fisica, l’anima del nemico cade preda delle fiamme voraci degli Epuratori.
fluff.ja: 敵の魂の守りが肉体と共に砕け散った時、魂そのものがパーゲイターの滅炎の餌食となる。
fluff.ko: 육체적 형태와 함께 영적 방어마저 깨진 적의 혼령은 숙청 집행원의 화염 앞에 속수무책일 뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 随着精神与肉体的粉碎，敌人的灵魂将被洗罪者们的毁灭火力烧尽。

target.en: That <k>Purgation Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>パーゲイション・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Purgation Squad unit is selected to make a fall‑back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Purgatortrupp-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento cuando una unidad Escuadra de Purgadores amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité d’Escouade Purgator amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Squadra Epuratori amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方パーゲイション・スカッド・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 숙청 분대 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方洗罪小队单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは射撃を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격 수행이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Once these warriors have acquired a spiritual target lock upon the animus of their enemies, they can hammer them with deadly fire, no matter the circumstances.
fluff.de: Haben diese Krieger einmal den Animus ihrer Feinde spirituell erfasst, können sie diese auch dann mit vernichtendem Beschuss zerschmettern, wenn sich die Lage rapide verändert.
fluff.es: Los Caballeros Grises san sus poderes psíquicos para percibir las posiciones enemigas (rastreando sus ánimas en el Immaterium) mientras retroceden, lo que les permite disparar rápidamente tras reposicionarse.
fluff.fr: Les Grey Knights peuvent utiliser leurs pouvoirs psychiques pour rester conscient des positions ennemies grâce aux signatures empyréennes, alors même qu'ils se replient, ce qui leur permet de tirer aussitôt après s'être repositionnés.
fluff.it: I Grey Knights usano i loro poteri psionici per tenere a mente le posizioni nemiche (ossia le firme spirituali nell’Immaterium) anche mentre ripiegano, per poter prendere la mira e sparare anche dopo essersi riposizionati.
fluff.ja: グレイナイトは異能の力を用い、撤退の最中にあってなお、非物質世界にある敵の魂を捉え続ける。それにより、配置転換を行った直後から、速やかに標的に射撃を行うことができるのだ。
fluff.ko: 그레이 나이트는 사이킥 능력을 활용해 적이 퇴각할 때도 그 위치(이마테리움의 영혼흔적)를 알 수 있으며, 이를 따라 재배치하여 빠르게 사격을 가할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: TODO: 灰骑士运用灵能，即便在撤退途中，亦能时刻感知敌军的位置（即亚空间中的灵魂印记）；这使他们得以在重新部署完毕后，迅速锁定目标并开火射击。

target.en: That <k>Purgation Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>パーゲイション・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Purgation Squad unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Purgatortrupp-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Purgadores amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Escouade Purgator amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Squadra Epuratori amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方パーゲイション・スカッド・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 숙청 분대 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方洗罪小队单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that unit have:
  • [Devastating Wounds].
  • [sustained hits 1].
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit. Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen jene Einheit haben:
  • [Verheerende Verwundungen].
  • [Trefferhagel 1].
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga. Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco esa unidad tienen:
  • [Heridas devastadoras].
  • [Golpes sostenidos 1].
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie. Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent l’unité choisie ont :
  • [Blessures Dévastatrices].
  • [touches soutenues 1].
effect.it:
Scegli un'unità nemica. Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio quell'unità hanno:
  • [Ferite Devastanti].
  • [Scarica di Colpi 1].
effect.ja:
敵ユニットを1個選択する。その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃が、選択した敵ユニットを対象としている場合、その攻撃は以下を持つ：
  • ［会心ウーンズ］。
  • ［連続命中1］。
effect.ko:
적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • [궤멸적 피해]
  • [연타 1]
effect.zh:
选择一个敌方单位。该己方单位对那个单位进行的远程攻击拥有：
  • [毁灭伤害]。
  • [连击 1]。

fluff.en: Concentrating their fire on a single luckless target and pouring all their psychic might into every shot, the Purgators sear their victims from existence as though cauterising an infested wound in the flesh of realspace.
fluff.de: Indem die Purgatoren all ihre Feuerkraft auf ein einziges glückloses Ziel richten und ihre psionische Macht in jeden Schuss geben, löschen sie ihre Feinde förmlich aus der Existenz, ganz als würden sie eine infizierte Wunde im Fleisch des Realraums ausbrennen.
fluff.es: Concentrando su fuego en un solo objetivo desafortunado y volcando todo su poder psíquico en cada disparo, los Purgadores queman a sus víctimas como si cauterizaran una herida infestada en la carne del espacio real.
fluff.fr: En concentrant leur feu sur une unique cible tout en déversant toute leur puissance psychique dans chaque tir, les Purgators annihilent leurs victimes comme s’ils cautérisaient une plaie infectée dans la trame de la réalité.
fluff.it: Concentrando il tiro su un singolo bersaglio e riversando in ogni colpo tutta la potenza psichica, gli Epuratori annientano le vittime sventurate come se fossero piaghe infette da cauterizzare sulla pelle dello spazio reale.
fluff.ja: パーゲイターたちは不運にも標的に選ばれた対象に射撃を集中させ、その一射ごとにあらゆる異能の力を注ぎ込む。そして実体空間に現れた肉体の傷を焼灼するかのように、存在そのものを焼き尽くしていく。
fluff.ko: 숙청 집행원은 대상에게 모든 사이킥 능력을 쏟아부으며 화력을 집중하고, 그 적은 현실우주의 상처가 불로 살균되듯 존재 자체가 불타 없어진다.
fluff.zh: 洗罪小队对一个不幸的目标进行集火，并在每一次射击中注入灵能力量。就像是对感染的伤口进行烧灼一样，他们的攻击能够将目标实体直接杀灭。

target.en: That <k>Interceptor Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インターセプター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Interceptor Squad unit starts an action.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Interceptortrupp-Einheit eine Aktion beginnt
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Interceptores amiga inicia una acción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Escouade Interceptor amie entreprend une action.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Squadra Intercettatori amica inizia un’azione.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方インターセプター・スカッド・ユニットがアクションを開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 요격원 분대 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 您的射击阶段中，在一个己方拦截者小队单位开始一次行动时。

effect.en: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Aktion verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Esa acción no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Cette action n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quell’azione non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、そのアクションを行った場合でも、射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 특수 행동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次行动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Employing telekinetic sorceries even in the midst of a furious battle, Interceptors are able to complete vital mission objectives while interdicting the foe’s forces.
fluff.de: Interceptoren setzen selbst mitten im tobenden Gefecht telekinetische Kräfte ein, um wichtige Missionsziele zu erfüllen, während sie die gegnerischen Streitkräfte abfangen.
fluff.es: Empleando hechicería telequinética incluso en medio de una batalla furiosa, los Interceptores pueden completar misiones vitales mientras interceptan las fuerzas enemigas.
fluff.fr: Les Interceptors ont recours à une sorcellerie télékinétique en plein combat, afin d'accomplir des missions vitales tout en affrontant les forces ennemies.
fluff.it: Impiegando stregonerie telecinetiche persino nel mezzo della mischia, gli Intercettatori sono in grado di conquistare obiettivi chiave mentre annientano le forze nemiche.
fluff.ja: 激戦のただ中にあっても念動の妖術を駆使し、迎撃者（ルビ、迎撃者：インターセプター）は敵の勢力を阻止しつつ、重要任務を完遂することができる。
fluff.ko: 요격원은 격전 중에도 염동력을 사용하여 적 군세를 제지하면서 동시에 중요한 임무 목표를 달성할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 拦截者们就算在激烈的战斗期间也能够利用念动巫术，在拦截敌人的同时完成重要任务。

target.en: That <k>Interceptor Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インターセプター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly Interceptor Squad unit ends a fall‑back move, if that Interceptor Squad unit is unengaged.
when.de: Die Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit, die sich im Nahkampf mit einer befreundeten Interceptortrupp-Einheit befand, eine Rückzugsbewegung beendet und jene Interceptortrupp-Einheit nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que estaba trabada con alguna unidad Escuadra de Interceptores amiga termina un movimiento de retroceder y esa unidad Escuadra de Interceptores no está trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui était engagée avec une unité d’Escouade Interceptor amie finit un mouvement de retraite, si l’unité d’Escouade Interceptor est non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica che era ingaggiata con un’unità Squadra Intercettatori amica ha terminato un movimento di ripiegamento, se quell’unità Squadra Intercettatori è non ingaggiata.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、味方インターセプター・スカッド・ユニットと接敵状態であった敵ユニットが退却移動を終了させた時、そのインターセプター・スカッド・ユニットが非接敵状態である場合。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 아군 요격원 분대와 교전 상태였던 적 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 종료할 때, 그 요격원 분대 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 경우.
when.zh: 您对手的移动阶段中，在原本与一个己方拦截者小队单位处于交战状态的一个敌方单位结束一次后撤移动后，并且那个拦截者小队单位不处于交战状态。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Masters of reading the ebb and flow of battle, Interceptors stay ever on the move and exploit any gap in the enemy lines with lightning swiftness.
fluff.de: Interceptoren sind Meister der Gezeiten der Schlacht. Sie bleiben immer in Bewegung und nutzen jede Lücke in den feindlichen Linien blitzschnell aus.
fluff.es: Maestros en leer las mareas de la batalla, los Interceptores siempre están en movimiento y explotan cualquier brecha en las líneas enemigas a la velocidad del rayo.
fluff.fr: Sensibles aux fluctuations de la bataille, les Interceptors sont toujours en mouvement et exploitent la moindre faille dans le dispositif ennemi à la vitesse de l’éclair.
fluff.it: Maestri nel leggere l’andamento della battaglia, gli Intercettatori sono sempre in movimento e sfruttano qualsiasi apertura nelle linee nemiche con rapidità fulminea.
fluff.ja: 戦場の流れを見極める迎撃者（ルビ、迎撃者：インターセプター）は、絶えず移動を続け、敵の陣形に生じたわずかな間隙さえも瞬時に突き崩す。
fluff.ko: 전투의 흐름을 읽는데 능한 요격원들은 끊임없이 이동하며 적진에 빈틈이 보이면 벼락처럼 재빠르게 공략한다.
fluff.zh: 拦截者十分擅长解读战场的动向，时刻进行移动并寻找敌阵当中的漏洞。

target.en: That <k>Interceptor Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インターセプター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Interceptor Squad unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Interceptortrupp-Einheit, die in diesem Zug eine Angriffsbewegung ausgeführt hat, zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Interceptores amiga que ha hecho algún movimiento de carga en este turno se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Escouade Interceptor amie qui a fait un mouvement de charge à ce tour est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, dopo che un’unità di Squadra Intercettatori amica che ha effettuato un movimento di carica in questo turno viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、このターン中に突撃移動を行った味方インターセプター・スカッド・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 이번 턴에 돌격 이동을 수행한 아군 요격원 분대 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个在该回合中进行过冲锋移动的己方拦截者小队单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Lance]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Lanza]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Lance]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>[Lancia]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍のユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［ランス］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[骑枪]</k>。

fluff.en: With exceptional skill, these Interceptors teleport perilously close to their foes, bursting from the Immaterium into their very midst with lethal force.
fluff.de: Mit außerordentlichem Talent teleportieren sich diese Interceptoren dicht an den Feind und brechen mit tödlicher Gewalt in dessen Linien ein.
fluff.es: Con una habilidad excepcional, estos Interceptores se teletransportan peligrosamente cerca de sus enemigos, irrumpiendo desde el inmaterium en medio de ellos con una fuerza letal.
fluff.fr: Avec un talent exceptionnel, ces Interceptors se téléportent dangereusement près de leurs ennemis, en jaillissant de l'Immaterium au beau milieu d'eux.
fluff.it: Grazie ad abilità eccezionali questi Intercettatori si teletrasportano pericolosamente vicini al bersaglio, erompendo dall’Immaterium proprio in mezzo alle forze nemiche.
fluff.ja: 迎撃者（ルビ、迎撃者：インターセプター）は熟練の技能によって敵の間近へと転移し、非物質空間を切り裂いて敵陣のただ中へと殺到する。
fluff.ko: 이 특출한 요격원들은 이마테리움을 통해 적의 한복판에 텔레포트하여 치명적인 공격을 가한다.
fluff.zh: 在娴熟的技巧下，拦截者们传送至极其接近敌人的危险位置，以致命的力量从亚空间中冲出。

target.en: That <k>Paladin Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>パラディン・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Paladin Squad unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine Paladintrupp-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase cuando una unidad Escuadra de Paladines amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité d’Escouade Paladin amie subit une blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità Squadra di Paladini amica subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方パラディン・スカッド・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 성기사 분대 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方圣骑士小队单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 4+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 4+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 4+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 4+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者4+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 4+。

fluff.en: Layered into the Paladins’ armour by shriven seers and blessed saints, these potent wards of abjuration turn aside attacks both supernatural and mundane.
fluff.de: Die Rüstungen der Paladine sind von hellseherischen Beichtvätern und segensreichen Heiligen mit mächtigen Schutzsiegeln versehen worden, die gleichermaßen weltliche wie auch übernatürliche Attacken abwehren.
fluff.es: Incorporadas en la armadura de los Paladines por videntes consagrados y santos benditos, estas potentes protecciones de abjuración desvían ataques tanto sobrenaturales como mundanos.
fluff.fr: Intégrés à l’armure des Paladins par des saints bénis et des scribes clairvoyants, ces puissants charmes d’abjuration détournent les attaques tant surnaturelles qu'ordinaires.
fluff.it: Questi potenti sigilli di abiura, stratificati nella corazza dei Paladini da veggenti sanzionati e santi benedetti, deflettono sia gli attacchi sovrannaturali che materiali.
fluff.ja: このパラディンたちの装甲服には、告解を受けた予見者や祝福されし聖人の手によって強力な防護術が施されており、超常的な攻撃も、通常の攻撃も等しく退けてしまう。
fluff.ko: 고행 중인 예언가와 축복된 성자가 성기사 갑주에 친히 새긴 이 단념의 가호는 초자연적인 공격이든 통상적인 공격이든 모두 방향을 바꾸어 버린다.
fluff.zh: 赦免先知与受祝圣人将强大的驱邪符文刻在了这位圣骑士的护甲中，能够阻挡非自然和常规攻击的侵害。

target.en: That <k>Paladin Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>パラディン・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Paladin Squad unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Paladintrupp-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Paladines amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Escouade Paladin amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Squadra di Paladini amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>パラディン・スカッド</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 성기사 분대 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方圣骑士小队单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Precision]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Precisión]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Précision]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>[Precisione]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［精密攻撃］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[精准]</k>技能。

fluff.en: Paladins, more than even their brother Grey Knights, must strive to lay low those heretical champions from whom the taint of damnation spreads to threaten the Imperium.
fluff.de: Paladine müssen noch mehr als ihre Brüder unter den restlichen Grey Knights danach streben, die häretischen Champions zu richten, die drohen, ihren Makel der Verderbnis auf das Imperium auszubreiten.
fluff.es: Los Paladines, incluso más que sus hermanos Caballeros Grises, deben esforzarse por abatir a esos campeones herejes que propagan la mancha de la condenación y amenazan al Imperium.
fluff.fr: Les Paladins, plus encore que leurs frères Grey Knights, doivent lutter pour faucher les champions ennemis dont la corruption menace de se répandre et menacer l’Imperium.
fluff.it: Rispetto ai confratelli, i Paladini sono ancora più decisi ad abbattere i campioni eretici, così da liberare l’Imperium dalla dannazione che portano.
fluff.ja: パラディンは、同胞たるグレイナイトをも凌ぐ勢いで、破滅の汚濁を蔓延させ〈帝国〉を脅かす異端者の闘士を打ち倒すべく、奮闘することが求められる。
fluff.ko: 성기사는 인류제국을 타락으로 물들이려는 이단 옹호자들을 쓰러뜨리기 위해 다른 그레이 나이트 형제들보다도 더욱 열성적이다.
fluff.zh: 圣骑士必须致力消灭异端勇士，防止他们的腐败和污秽侵蚀帝国。

target.en: That <k>Paladin Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>パラディン・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Paladin Squad</k> unit.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Paladintrupp</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Escuadra de Paladines</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité d’<k>Escouade Paladin</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità <k>Squadra di Paladini</k> amica.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>パラディン・スカッド</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>성기사 분대</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>圣骑士小队</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: That enemy unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Hazardous]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de esa unidad enemiga tienen <k>[De riesgo]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de cette unité ennemie ont <k>[À Risque]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia di quell’unità nemica hanno <k>[Pericolosa]</k>.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［暴発］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛의 백병전 공격에 <k>[위험]</k>을 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 那个敌方单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[危险]</k>。

fluff.en: Chanting incantations of vengeful wrath, the Paladins curse those who strike at them to be laid low by their own strength and hatred.
fluff.de: Die Paladine stimmen Hymnen rachsüchtigen Zorns an und belegen damit jene, die nach ihnen schlagen, mit einem Fluch, der deren eigene Kraft und Verachtung gegen sie wendet.
fluff.es: Entonando conjuros de ira vengativa, los Paladines maldicen a quienes los atacan para que sean abatidos por su propia fuerza y ​​odio.
fluff.fr: En scandant des incantations de colère vengeresse, les Paladins maudissent ceux qui les assaillent, les condamnant à périr sous leurs coups et leur haine vertueuse.
fluff.it: Intonando maledizioni di furia vendicativa i Paladini condannano chi li attacca a essere abbattuti dalla propria forza e odio.
fluff.ja: 復讐の憤怒の祈祷を唱えながら、パラディンたちは襲撃者に呪詛を向け、己の力と憎悪によって打ち倒そうとする。
fluff.ko: 팔라딘이 앙심어린 분노를 낭송하며 공격하는 이들이 스스로의 힘과 증오로 인해 멸망하리라 저주한다.
fluff.zh: 圣骑士们吟诵着复仇的咒语，诅咒那些攻击他们的人，让他们被自己的力量和仇恨所击垮。

name.ja: 予見的射撃（アップグレード）

description.en: Purgation Squad unit only. This unit’s snap shooting attacks hit on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
description.de: Nur für eine Purgatortrupp-Einheit. Eiliger-Beschuss-Attacken dieser Einheit treffen bei unmodifizierten Trefferwürfen von 5+.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Purgadores. Los ataques de disparos repentinos de esta unidad impactan con toda tirada para impactar de 5+ sin modificar.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Purgator seulement. Les attaques de tir au jugé de cette unité touchent sur des jets de touche non modifiés de 5+.
description.it: Solo unità Squadra Epuratori. Gli attacchi tiro improvviso di questa unità colpiscono con tiri per colpire non modificati di 5+.
description.ja: パーゲイション・スカッド・ユニットのみ。このユニットの即応射撃攻撃は、修正前のヒットロールの出目が5+でヒットする。
description.ko: 숙청 분대 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 스냅 샷 공격은 그 명중 굴림의 값이 보정되지 않은 5+라면 명중합니다.
description.zh: 仅限洗罪小队单位。该单位的快速射击攻击在未修正命中掷骰结果为 5+ 时命中。

name.ja: 定められし座標（アップグレード）

description.en: Interceptor Squad unit only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.
description.de: Nur für eine Interceptortrupp-Einheit. In deiner ersten Bewegungsphase kann diese Einheit eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Interceptores. En tu primera fase de movimiento, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento de inserción.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Interceptor seulement. À votre première phase de Mouvement, cette unité peut faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
description.it: Solo unità di Squadra Intercettatori. Nella tua prima fase di Movimento questa unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
description.ja: インターセプター・スカッド・ユニットのみ。自軍の最初の移動フェイズ中、このユニットは 突入移動を行える。
description.ko: 요격원 분대 유닛 전용. 플레이어의 첫 번째 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛은 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限拦截者小队单位。在您的第一个移动阶段中，该单位可以进行一次入场移动。

name.ja: 位相の重複（アップグレード）

description.en: Interceptor Squad unit only. This unit has Stealth.
description.de: Nur für eine Interceptortrupp-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat Tarnung.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Interceptores. Esta unidad tiene Sigilo.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Interceptor seulement. Cette unité a Discrétion.
description.it: Solo unità di Squadra Intercettatori. Questa unità ha Furtività.
description.ja: インターセプター・スカッド・ユニットのみ。このユニットは隠密能力を持つ。
description.ko: 요격원 분대 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 스텔스를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限拦截者小队单位。该单位拥有隐匿。

description.en: Terminator model only. This unit has +1 to charge rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Terminator-Modell. Diese Einheit hat +1 auf Angriffswürfe.
description.es: Solo miniatura Exterminador. Esta unidad tiene +1 a las Tiradas de carga.
description.fr: Figurine de Terminator seulement. Cette unité a +1 aux jets de charge.
description.it: Solo modelli Terminator. Questa unità ha +1 ai tiri per caricare.
description.ja: ターミネイター・兵のみ。このユニットの突撃ロールは+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 터미네이터 모델 전용. 이 유닛에 돌격 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限终结者模型。该单位进行的冲锋掷骰结果 +1。

name.ja: 崇敬されし兵器（アップグレード）

description.en: Purgation Squad unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have +2 S.
description.de: Nur für eine Purgatortrupp-Einheit. Die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben +2 S.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Purgadores. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen +2 F.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Purgator seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont +2 en F.
description.it: Solo unità di Squadra Epuratori. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno +2 Fo.
description.ja: パーゲイション・スカッド・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は【攻】に+2の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 숙청 분대 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 위력 +2를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限洗罪小队单位。该单位远程攻击的 S 属性 +2。

description.en: Terminator model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.
description.de: Nur für ein Terminator-Modell. Zu Beginn deiner Fernkampfphase kannst du eine für diese Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
description.es: Solo miniatura Exterminador. Al inicio de tu fase de disparo, puedes elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible para esta unidad y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
description.fr: Figurine de Terminator seulement. Au début de votre phase de Tir, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de cette unité. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo modelli Terminator. All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro puoi scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" da questa unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja: ターミネイター・兵のみ。自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択してもよい。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 터미네이터 모델 전용. 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 시작 시, 이 유닛의 12” 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6”을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限终结者模型。在己方射击阶段开始时，您可以选择一个位于该单位 12" 内且可见的敌方单位。那个敌方单位的侦测范围增加 6"。

description.en: **GREY KNIGHTS WALKER** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates, the bearer can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer: on a 2-5, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.
**GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY** model only. In your Movement phase, each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a **TRANSPORT,** until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.
**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when the bearer’s unit is selected as the target of a ranged attack, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and then set it back up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. If the bearer’s unit is no longer an eligible target, your opponent can then select new targets for any attacks that had targeted the bearer’s unit.
**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Gate of Infinity rule.

**GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if the bearer’s unit disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

**GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability, and while the bearer is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, each time a melee attack made by the bearer scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.
**GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can select one friendly **GREY KNIGHTS** unit within 18" of and visible to it. If it does, until the end of the phase, that unit is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:

▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.
**GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.
**GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.
**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

**GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer’s unit is not eligible to declare a charge.
**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 4 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the battle round, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer’s unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

**GREY KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.
While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.
Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** storm bolter; Nemesis force weapon.

wargear.en: This model’s storm bolter can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 incinerator ◦ 1 psilencer ◦ 1 psycannon

fluff.en: As the strong left hands of their Grand Masters, the Brother-Captains are seasoned battlefield commanders and potent warriors. They turn their prodigious psychic gifts to the swift annihilation of their enemies, augmenting their battle-brothers’ strength, sensing the foe’s hidden weaknesses, and setting an uncompromising example to those who follow them.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **BROTHERHOOD TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **PALADIN SQUAD**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
Each time this model destroys an enemy **CHARACTER** model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** storm bolter; Nemesis force weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A Brotherhood Champion acts as an exemplar of martial prowess to which all Grey Knights aspire. He is a warrior of peerless skill who mentors recruits in the ways of the blade. Upon the battlefield, these singular warriors set a merciless example to their brothers, singling out the war leaders of the enemy host and cutting them down in brutal duels where only victory matters.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **PURGATION SQUAD** ■ **STRIKE SQUAD**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **GREY KNIGHTS** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Chaplains safeguard the spiritual sanctity of their battle-brothers and the Chapter as a whole. They chant liturgies of sacred fortitude and unmerciful zeal, projecting these both in the form of stentorian, vox-amplified oration and through telepathic sorcery directly into the minds of their fellows. In this way, the Chaplains help to bolster the Grey Knights’ already formidable resolve.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **BROTHERHOOD TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **PALADIN SQUAD**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.
While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a attack if the attacking model is within 18".

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Nemesis force weapon; Vortex of Doom

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 combi-weapon ◦ 1 storm bolter

fluff.en: Even in a Chapter of potent psykers, the Grey Knights’ Librarians wield the energies of the Warp with exacting control and devastating power. Even as they shield their battle-brothers with whirling storms of psychic flame and the warding sigils wrought into their arcane wargear, the Librarians gather their true might before unleashing it in vortices of devastating sorcerous annihilation.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **BROTHERHOOD TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **PALADIN SQUAD**

description.en: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

In your Command phase, you can select one friendly **GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE** model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that **VEHICLE** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

Each time an enemy unit ends a charge move engaged with one or more friendly **GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE** units and within 6" of this unit, you can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:

▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** forge bolter; grav-pistol; Omnissian power axe; servo-arm.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: On those occasions when their duties take them to the battlefield, the Grey Knights’ Techmarines turn all their arcane engineering lore to preserving their Chapter’s irreplaceable war machines. Relying more upon the gifts of the Omnissiah than the psychic talents employed so widely by their brothers, the Techmarines wield potent blades and firearms against the foe.

fluff.en: Massively armoured, heavily armed and ruthlessly devoted to their sacred duties, Grey Knights Terminators form the indomitable heart of many strike forces. Some squads are accompanied by Apothecaries, whose nartheciums dispense healing salves to staunch grievous wounds, or Ancients who hold aloft finely wrought banners to inspire their battle-brothers in war.

name.en: Champion of the Order of Purifiers

fluff.en: Castellan Crowe charges into battle, wreathed in the blinding psychic fire that is the hallmark of his order. Though he will never be fool enough to unlock the forbidden power of the Black Blade of Antwyr, he still wields the captive blade with tremendous skill and strength, using it, his storm bolter and his potent psychic might to cut a path through his foes.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **PURIFIER SQUAD**

fluff.en: The Grand Masters are the leaders of the Grey Knights brotherhoods and stand amongst their greatest warriors. More than this, they are accomplished battle psykers able to augment their martial might with tightly focused empyric power and strategic scholars and savants whose grasp of the strategies required to battle the supernatural and malign is unmatched.

fluff.en: Piloting a Nemesis Dreadknight allows a Grand Master to wield the kind of ordnance usually restricted to battle tanks. Augmented with his psychic puissance and the servo-driven strength to wield huge and terrifying melee weapons, the sheer killing power of such a warrior is terrifying indeed.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Each time this model’s unit fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Grand Master Aldrik Voldus wields the mighty Malleus Argyrum, a daemon hammer whose head dances with sorcerous flame few foes can withstand. One of the most potent psykers his Chapter has known in years, he also possesses the power to unleash waves of soulfire against his enemies and to conjure sanctuaries of dancing psychic luminescence that shield his brothers from harm.

Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Mighty Thunderhawk Gunships serve the Grey Knights Chapter as any other. Powerful, versatile flyers, they deploy squads of Titan’s sons into the heart of battle whilst slaughtering hosts of enemies with their vast array of anti-personnel and anti-armour weapons.

fluff.en: Interceptor squads embody the Grey Knights’ ability to respond rapidly to crises and emergent threats. Their teleporters enable them to flicker in and out of realspace, performing short-ranged teleport ’shunts’ and bursting from the Warp repeatedly with guns blazing and Nemesis force weapons singing as they butcher the unsuspecting foe.

fluff.en: The redoubtable Land Raider is the perfect armoured transport tank for the Grey Knights. Its arsenal of potent firepower is more than enough to mow down hordes of foes and blast their armour support to scrap even as the Land Raider roars forward to deliver its passengers into the heart of the shell-shocked enemies lines.

fluff.en: Designed for storming defence lines and trenches, the Land Raider Crusader lays down withering anti-personnel fire as it advances. The Grey Knights often employ it to tear through the defenders of ritual sites and halt their diabolical summoning rites.

fluff.en: A terror weapon with few equals, the Land Raider Redeemer mounts enormous flamestorm cannons. Those fielded by the Grey Knights project arcs of blinding sanctified flame that ignite the soul and the psyche as well as the physical and make these tanks exceptional tools for rooting supernatural horrors and entrenched heretics out of the densest cover.

fluff.en: Nemesis Dreadknights wield enormous Nemesis force weapons and provide devastating heavy firepower. The lowering psychic presences of their pilots coupled with servo-assisted speed and might enables these exo-suits to stride through ranks of foes like giants, heedless of those who seek to bar their advance.

fluff.en: Amongst the greatest warriors in the Imperium, Paladins throw themselves into combat against monstrous daemonic adversaries. They are the staunchest warriors of the Grey Knights and exemplars of martial might; each Paladin has banished one of the most powerful daemons ever to manifest.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks: until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

fluff.en: Providing vital heavy-fire support for the highly mobile assaults favoured by the Grey Knights, Purgation Squads comprise master sharpshooters armed with powerful firearms. Focusing their psychic potential to detect foes concealed in the heaviest cover and even bend their shots through the air to seek their prey, their volleys leave the enemy cowering in abject terror.

fluff.en: The Purifiers blast onto the battlefield, wreathed in a blinding maelstrom of psychic light. Utterly dedicated to the eradication of the most dreadful threats to Mankind, they carve a bloody path into the very heart of even the most immense and terrible hordes, driven unwaveringly onward by their sanctity of purpose, scouring the foe from their path with blasts of sorcerous soul fire.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **TRANSPORT** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

fluff.en: The Razorback is an adaptation of the Rhino that sacrifices some transport capacity for a hull-mounted heavy weapon’s ammunition and power cells, ideal for rapidly transporting elite teams of power-armoured Grey Knights into battle. Razorbacks are thus able to lay down coordinated covering fire as their passengers disembark.

fluff.en: Dauntless, durable and ruggedly resilient, Rhinos have been the ubiquitous armoured transport of the Space Marines for millennia. Those fielded by the Grey Knights are heavily warded, their hulls shot through with truesilver psychocircuitry that redoubles the protection of the Aegis in their vicinity.

This model’s las-talon can be replaced with 1 icarus stormcannon.

fluff.en: As pugnacious as it is swift and agile, the Stormhawk Interceptor is an exceptional air superiority fighter. With a Grey Knight in the pilot seat and its hull worked with sorcerous wards, this craft can blast winged daemonic abominations from the skies and slay heretic aircraft in vicious dogfights.

fluff.en: Powerful close-support aircraft, Stormraven Gunships can deploy Grey Knights and even a revered Dreadnought where empyric disturbances prevent teleportation. Resilient and bristling with heavy weapons, Stormravens excel in armoured assaults and the fiery purgations of landing zones.

fluff.en: Stormtalon Gunships are highly manoeuvrable aircraft that are versatile in their role and choice of target. Often running escort duties for larger craft, they hunt down Warp-spawned foes. Using vectored afterburners, their pilots unleash ground attacks, saturating teleportation zones with fire and clearing them for their brothers.

description.en: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Strike Squads act as vanguard forces, employing teleport technologies and sorcery to manifest deep within the enemy lines. Once in position, they launch devastating shock assaults against unprepared foes, wielding an arsenal of Nemesis force weaponry, heavy firepower and psychic fury to capture and sorcerously ward vital tactical locations.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a **GREY KNIGHTS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

This model’s assault cannon can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 heavy plasma cannon ◦ 1 twin lascannon

fluff.en: The ancient Grey Knights interred within Venerable Dreadnought sarcophagi direct their potent heavy weapons and the blows of their hydraulic fists with time-honed skill. Yet their many centuries of wisdom and experience are most valuable of all, aiding them in commanding strike forces while offering psychic guidance to their battle-brothers.
